text:
It's been determined that the white, elliptical/oval pill with the imprint 44 175 is an Acetaminophen 500 mg capsule. In the pharmaceutical industry, it's made by IVAX Pharmaceuticals. To treat sciatica, muscular pain, a fever, eustachian tube dysfunction, and general discomfort, acetaminophen is utilised. It belongs to the miscellaneous analgesics pharmacological class.

more here https://www.healthimhere.com/44175-pill-acetaminophen-500-mg-uses-side-effects-reviews.html
